title: corymbis decumbens
intro: Corymbis decumbens, also known as the creeping juniper, is a type of low-growing, evergreen shrub native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with Corymbis decumbens include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Corymbis decumbens can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal purposes, and its berries can be used to make a flavorful and medicinal jam.
